title: 1 step DFU - Settings/Update tab both on the lates
scenario: Settings > SW Update shows "Up to date" when app, Osprey headset, Embedded Bluetooth, and Charge Case are all on latest firmware
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and updated to the latest version.
2. Ensure the Osprey headset, Embedded Bluetooth (EB), and Charge Case (CC) are all on the latest firmware.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
6. Observe the status displayed on the SW Update screen.
expected: The SW Update screen displays "Up to date" with no update available.
